compiled_state.author: Iso Tester
compiled_state.description:
Bundle of low-effort, low-risk, zero-behavior-change accuracy fixes surfaced by the 2026-06-27 audit. Grouped together because each is a trivial text/comment edit; splitting them into separate tickets would be more overhead than the fixes themselves.

## What / files
- `src/rebar/_optional.py:3-12` — docstring says "the ONLY hard dependency is `pyyaml`"; it is now THREE core deps (pyyaml + jsonschema + referencing per `pyproject.toml:39-41`) and omits the `[grounding]` extra it defines at `:34-39`. Correct both.
- `src/rebar/mcp_server.py:300` — `build_server()` install hint says `pip install 'rebar[mcp]'`; the PyPI dist is `nava-rebar` → must be `'nava-rebar[mcp]'` (client-facing instruction). The `[agents]` hints are already correct.
- `docs/event-schema.md` + `docs/concurrency.md:14,24,48,125,257` — stale post-migration paths: `_engine/ticket_reducer/`→`reducer/`, `ticket_graph/`→`graph/`, `_engine/ticket_reads.py`→`_engine_support/reads.py`; update/disclaim the `event-schema.md` "Written by" column citing deleted `ticket-*.sh`.
- `docs/config.md:91-93` — add the live `verify.*` keys missing from the inventory: `progressive_drift_refresh` (default false, `config.py:266,374`), `require_completion_verification_for_close`, `require_plan_review_for_claim`.
- `README.md:248-268` — CLI block omits `claim`; add `rebar claim <id> --assignee <you>` near `transition` (CLAUDE.md calls it the mandatory first step).
- `src/rebar/llm/workflow/steps.py:331` — comment claims "plan_review does not import the workflow package"; it DOES (`workflow_ops.py:35`). Correct the comment to state the real lazy-import constraint (interim; the structural back-edge fix is out of this epic's scope).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `_optional.py` docstring names all 3 core deps and lists `[grounding]`.
- [ ] `mcp_server.py:300` hint reads `nava-rebar[mcp]`.
- [ ] No stale `ticket_reducer/`/`ticket_graph/`/`ticket_reads.py` path remains in `event-schema.md`/`concurrency.md` (grep clean).
- [ ] `config.md` documents the three `verify.*` keys with defaults.
- [ ] `README.md` CLI block includes `claim`.
- [ ] `steps.py:331` comment is factually correct.
- [ ] No source behavior changes; `make check` passes.
compiled_state.title: Quick wins: doc & comment accuracy fixes
